title: RM01 baseline aggregate validator
objective:
Create file governance/validators/validate_working_baseline_aggregate.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from pathlib import Path

REQUIRED_FILES = [
    "governance/runners/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py",
    "governance/state/READINESS_LEVELS_SCHEMA.json",
    "governance/validators/validate_readiness_levels.py",
    "governance/validators/validate_pass_sources.py",
    "governance/validators/validate_release_gates.py",
    "governance/runners/telegram_production_receipt_collector.py",
    "governance/runners/live_runtime_receipt_collector.py",
    "governance/runners/external_claude_audit_result_collector.py",
    "governance/state/WORKING_BASELINE_STATUS_CHECKPOINT_FINAL.json"
]

def main() -> int:
    missing = [path for path in REQUIRED_FILES if not Path(path).exists()]
    result = {"status":"ok" if not missing else "blocked_missing_files", "missing": missing, "release_pass": False}
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    return 0 if not missing else 2

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
Create file tests/governance/test_working_baseline_aggregate_validator.py with content import subprocess
import sys

def test_working_baseline_aggregate_validator_executes():
    result = subprocess.run([sys.executable, "governance/validators/validate_working_baseline_aggregate.py"], capture_output=True, text=True)
    assert result.returncode in (0, 2)
    assert "release_pass" in result.stdout
